creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Strange, I get this:

# make patch
===>  License OPENSSH accepted by the user
===>   openssh-portable-9.7.p1,1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> openssh-9.7p1-gsskex-all-debian-rh-9.7p1.patch is not in /usr/ports/security/openssh-portable/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/security/openssh-portable/distinfo is out of date, or
=> openssh-9.7p1-gsskex-all-debian-rh-9.7p1.patch is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
